name: G02 — Gerador · Posts com Imagem via IA · v1.1
description: Gera posts com texto (Gemini) + imagem (Imagen 3) para Instagram, salva como pending_approval. Roda Seg/Qua/Sex 8h.

parameters.query: SELECT t.tenant_id, t.clinic_name, t.doctor_name, t.speciality, t.city, t.state FROM public.tenants t WHERE t.status = 'active' AND t.chatwoot_url IS NOT NULL AND t.doctor_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.tenant_id

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('Posts finalizados:', new Date().toISOString());
return { done: true };

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.tenant_posts (tenant_id, post_text, hashtags, post_type, platform, specialty_topic, status, ai_model, post_image_url, ai_prompt_used) VALUES ($1, $2, string_to_array($3, '|'), $4, $5, $6, 'pending_approval', $7, $8, $9) RETURNING id, tenant_id, post_type, status, post_image_url
